steps.title: Identify the shift from claim to example
steps.content: The second sentence asserts that tribal stories support the researchers' belief. The third sentence then shows what those tribal stories specifically describe. This movement from general claim to concrete supporting detail is the key relationship.

steps.title: Choose the transition expressing this relationship
steps.content:
“For example,” introduces specific details substantiating the preceding claim about tribal stories.

The other options either wrongly suggest causality, introduce false contrast, or mischaracterize the connection as parallel rather than illustrative.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
